title: How to Prepare Artwork for Custom Patch Production
excerpt: Learn the recommended file formats, minimum text sizes, color matching tips and artwork preparation steps for custom embroidered, woven, PVC and chenille patches.
seoTitle: How to Prepare Artwork for Custom Patch Production | KaKa Patches
seoDescription: Essential guide to preparing artwork for custom patch production. Recommended file formats, color matching, minimum text sizes and design tips for best results.
content:
## Getting Your Artwork Production-Ready

Proper artwork preparation ensures the best possible result for your custom patches. Here is what you need to know.

## Recommended File Formats

**Vector files (preferred):**
- AI (Adobe Illustrator)
- EPS
- PDF

**Raster files (acceptable for quoting):**
- PNG (high resolution)
- JPG (high resolution)
- PSD (Photoshop)

Vector files produce the best results because they can be scaled to any size without quality loss.

## Artwork Tips by Patch Type

### Embroidered Patches
- Keep text above 5mm for best readability
- Avoid extremely fine lines
- Use solid colors rather than gradients

### Woven Patches
- Small text and fine details reproduce well
- Thin lines are achievable
- Best for intricate logo designs

### PVC Patches
- Bold designs work best
- Consider 2D vs 3D based on complexity
- PMS color matching available

### Chenille Patches
- Large letters and bold graphics recommended
- Simple designs translate best to yarn texture
- Combine with embroidery for fine details

## What If Your Artwork Is Not Ready?

Our design team can help. Upload sketches, reference images or a rough idea — we will prepare it for patch production at no extra cost for qualifying bulk orders.
